Emma was also placed at the zoo by eyewitnesses. The key is the timing of the murder: Daniel was found dead at the zoo, so the murder happened there, not at the bar. Amelia has no alibi for the zoo visit since she was there alone setting up. Emma planned the zoo trip and was also present.
